intro: Cubanola daphnoides, also known as Cuban daphne, is a shrub-like plant that belongs to the family Thymelaeaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, offering relief from anxiety, insomnia, and stress due to its sedative and anxiolytic effects. The bioactive constituents of Cubanola daphnoides include daphnin, an alkaloid responsible for its pharmacological activities, along with other compounds like flavonoids and terpenoids. Cubanola daphnoides is commonly prepared as a tea or used in capsule form to utilize its health benefits, and it is also used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
